name: Shroomboom
description: Shroomboom is a one-eyed mushroom who is one of the eight Skylanders in Skylanders: Giants. He is of the Life element. His Series 2 counterpart is named Sure Shot Shroomboom.
biography: Shroomboom was most unfortunate to have been born in a pizza topping garden belonging to Kaos. Growing up among his fellow fungi, he knew it was only a matter of time before a late night craving would bring about their demise. So Shroomboom took a twig and a strand of spider web and made a slingshot. One by one, he launched all of his friends over the garden fence before flinging himself over to join them. Then he guided them all to the edge of the island and leapt to freedom, using his mushroom cap to catch a friendly breeze. Now as a member of the Skylanders, Shroomboom continues to perform courageous deeds... but he can be hard to find on pizza night.
personality: Courageous and determined, Shroomboom lets nothing stand in his way. He's always ready to parachute into danger, no matter the risk.

story.content: Growing up, there were two words Shroomboom lived in fear of: pizza night. As one of the group of living mushrooms inhabiting a pizza-topping garden owned by Kaos, Shroomboom knew he was destined to become part of a tasty midnight snack. While the other mushrooms resigned to their fate, Shroomboom decided there must be more to life than being sliced, cooked and slathered in cheese. Fashioning a catapult from a twig and a length of spider web, he fired his fungi friends over the wall, before launching himself over too. Their route to safety was not easy, but with Shroomboom taking the lead, the entire mushroom crop made their escape. It is believed a family of pineapple chunks weren't lucky. Shroomboom now uses his slingshot skills as a member of the Skyanders, although he is still haunted by the smell of mozzarella and tomato sauce.

content: Put a cap on that victory!
That put the fun in fungus!
Awesome, a cap for my cap!
Nice, more protection for my brain!

trivia: Shroomboom's official catchphrase is a play on 'He Shoots, He Scores!'
According to I-Wei Huang, he was a very difficult character to pose in toy form, due to having a giant mushroom hat that covers his eye.
Shroomboom's mushroom species is a Fly Agaric. Despite the fact Shroomboom was born in a pizza topping garden, Fly Agaric mushrooms are types of toadstool and are actually poisonous.
Despite being afraid of pizza, this may not be true in gameplay as pizza appears as a food item to restore health.
He and Chill are the only ones with something sticking out of the pedestals, namely the glowing mushroom.
In-game and toy form, Shroomboom's slingshot is green. However, in the promotional artwork, it's brown.

The spikes on his back in Skylanders Giants are placed in a square grid, contradicting his toy model where the spikes are placed 45 degrees rotated to form a diamond grid. The disparity was later corrected in Skylanders: SWAP Force.
Shroomboom is one of the Skylanders to have 'Boom' in his name (others include Boomer, Boom Jet, Sonic Boom, Ka-Boom, and Boom Bloom).
He and Pop Fizz are the only two Skylanders who got a repose in Trap Team that don't have a Mini counterpart.
There are over 10,000 different species of mushroom in Skylands. Of those 10,000, Shroomboom is the only one to have dedicated his life to fighting the forces of evil.
Sure Shot Shroomboom's artwork can be seen in the Season 1 intro of the Skylanders Academy TV series within The Book of Skylanders.
Shroomboom was one of the many Skylanders planned to appear in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Before the game's closure, only concept art of his Awakened Form was released.
During Giants' early development, Shroomboom's abilities and upgrades had different names. He also had several abilities that never carried over to the final game.

trailers.name: Skylanders Giants - Shroomboom's Soul Gem Preview (He Shoots, He Spores)
Meet the Skylanders Sure Shot ShroomBoom

gameplay: Shroomboom attacks by shooting exploding mushrooms with a slingshot. His secondary attack is a force field of mushrooms. He can also launch slow mushrooms that glide before they fall and explode and launch himself out of his slingshot, and use his own mushroom cap to glide for short distances.

basic.name: Slingshot
basic.content: Press the Attack 1 button to shoot exploding mushrooms.

basic.name: Mushroom Ring
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to spawn a ring of mushrooms that damage enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Launch Paratroopers
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to shoot mushroom paratroopers who drop down from the sky.

basic_upgrades.name: Bigger Boomshrooms
basic_upgrades.content: Press and hold Attack 1 to charge up a giant exploding mushroom.

basic_upgrades.name: Bouncing Boomshrooms
basic_upgrades.content: Exploding mushrooms bounce on the ground and do increased damage.

soulgems.name: Self-Slingshot
soulgems.content: While holding Attack 1, press Attack 2 to slingshot Shroomboom towards enemies

wow_pows.name: High Spore
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 1 to create mushroom bumpers and play pinball with enemies.

abilities.name: Spore Power
abilities.content: Mushroom Ring creates a damaging spore cloud.

abilities.name: Ultimate Ring
abilities.content: Mushroom Ring is the biggest it gets.

abilities.name: Back to the Beginning
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to remain underground, where you can move around freely.

abilities.name: Lock 'N' Load
abilities.content: Can fire exploding mushrooms faster that do increased damage.

abilities.name: Fungal Infestation
abilities.content: Mushroom Paratroopers stick to enemies and do damage over time.

abilities.name: Paratrooper Invasion
abilities.content: Shoot three Mushroom Paratroopers at once.
